programme.title: Storage Wars

programme.title: Storage Wars
programme.desc: Lisa keeps getting her lockers taken from her, and it makes her hopping mad; Kenny goes in for a banjo but comes out with a harmonica; Dusty and Lupe find the locker of her dreams; Ivy finds a vehicle in his locker, just not the one he expected.

programme.title: Storage Wars
programme.desc: Buyers chase lockers rumored to be packed with rock 'n' roll memorabilia, from vintage guitars to rare collectibles; big risks lead to surprising finds, while expert appraisers determine what's a true treasure and what's just noise.
